scripts.deploy: npm run build:cf && npm run assemble && wrangler pages deploy .deploy --project-name wokspec-dilu --branch main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.preview: npm run build:cf && wrangler pages dev .open-next/assets
scripts.assemble: rm -rf .deploy && mkdir -p .deploy && cp -r .open-next/assets/. .deploy/ && cp .open-next/worker.js .deploy/_worker.js && cp -r .open-next/cloudflare .deploy/cloudflare && cp -r .open-next/server-functions .deploy/server-functions && cp -r .open-next/middleware .deploy/middleware; cp -r .open-next/.build .deploy/.build && node -e "const r={version:1,include:['/*'],exclude:['/_next/static/*','/favicon.ico','/_next/image*','/*.png','/*.jpg','/*.svg','/*.ico','/*.webp','/*.woff2','/*.woff','/*.ttf','/og.png','/manifest.webmanifest','/robots.txt']};require('fs').writeFileSync('.deploy/_routes.json',JSON.stringify(r))"
